form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (22.76) over 388m at this track. Top-three hope with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (22.76) over 388m at this track. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 400m at The Gardens behind Federal Senor beaten 10 lengths (23.25). Was in the money two on end before missing the frame last time. Worth another try.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fast starter. Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 400m at The Gardens behind Federal Senor beaten 10 lengths (23.25). Was in the money two on end before missing the frame last time. Worth another try.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.28) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 10 lengths. Has two placings from three starts from the draw. Tough field and looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (23.28) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 10 lengths. Has two placings from three starts from the draw. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Placed last time (23.16) at The Gardens in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 6 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Looks a place chance at best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (23.16) at The Gardens in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 6 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at The Gardens over 400m. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at The Gardens over 400m. Has ability and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made contact with the running rail rounding the turn into the front straight.

form.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a fifth (26.03) in a GR 5 at Goulburn. Makes return after a five months break. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished off last campaign with a fifth (26.03) in a GR 5 at Goulburn. Makes return after a five months break. Will need the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin then turned and shifted inwards sharply on jumping.
Came together at the turn into the back straight and fell.

form.formComment: Country racer who only starts fairly, coming off mixed results. Was 8th last start over 324m at Richmond Straight (18.41) beaten 9 lengths, behind Kiwi Golfer in Grade 5 on April 2. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Country racer who only starts fairly, coming off mixed results. Was 8th last start over 324m at Richmond Straight (18.41) beaten 9 lengths, behind Kiwi Golfer in Grade 5 on April 2. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the home turn galloped off the back.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won easily by 6 lengths at this track (22.42) beating Jeanna in a Grade 5 on March 24. Prefer in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won easily by 6 lengths at this track (22.42) beating Jeanna in a Grade 5 on March 24. Prefer in something easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 4th on April 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind Physicality beaten 1.75 lengths (23.30) in a Grade 5. Looks a strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished last on March 31 over 388m at this track behind Drink Rose beaten 7 lengths (23.33) in a Grade 5. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.
